arts.ttl: Barcelona monitor Bayern Munich star for remainder of 2024-25 season
arts.sum: Barcelona are gearing up for a busy summer. Now that they are back within La Liga’s 1:1 rule, they will find it easier to sign players, and the intention is to add a few players to Hansi Flick’s squad before the start of the 2025-26 season, which kicks off in August.
